html:
Exclusive to:

Tab Icon.

The Hanging Lamps Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. All Hanging Lights emit light.

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be acquired in the Hanging Lamps Tab:

Name Recipe Description Spawn Code

Chandelier		 ×8 "Soft and bold." swinging_light_chandalier_candles

Rope Light		 ×1 "Light with a rustic feel." swinging_light_rope_1

Blown Glass Bulb		 ×10 "Delicate yet substantial." swinging_light_floral_bulb

Cherry Lamp Shade		 ×12 "A sweet cheerful design." swinging_light_pendant_cherries

Metal Shade Lamp		 ×6 "A sturdy metal design." swinging_light_basic_metal

Wired Bulb		 ×5 "At least it's wired." swinging_light_basic_bulb

Dual Rope Light		 ×1 "Twice the bleakness." swinging_light_rope_2

Hanging Blooming Lamp		 ×12 "Floral themed illumination." swinging_light_floral_scallop

Hanging Floral Lamp		 ×12 "Brighting[sic] your ceiling." swinging_light_floral_bloomer

Tophat Light		 ×12 "Add some sophistication." swinging_light_tophat

Derby Light		 ×12 "Render the hat unusable." swinging_light_derby
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Tab Icon.
The Hanging Lamps Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. All Hanging Lights emit light.
Craftable Items and Structures[edit | edit source]
The following items and structures can be acquired in the Hanging Lamps Tab:
Name
Recipe
Description
Spawn Code
Chandelier
×8
"Soft and bold."
swinging_light_chandalier_candles
“A fancy hanging light.”
–Wilson, when examining a Chandelier
“This needs fire.”
–Willow, when examining a Chandelier
“Is fancy light.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Chandelier
“A futile attempt to battle the darkness.”
–Wendy, when examining a Chandelier
“FIRE BASED LIGHT ACCESSORY”
–WX-78, when examining a Chandelier
“Necessary for night reading.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Chandelier
“That's a fancy one, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining a Chandelier
“A ceiling light.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Chandelier
“Incendiary.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Chandelier
“I care nöt for its frilliness!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Chandelier
“Good. We need a light.”
–Webber, when examining a Chandelier
“Who's gonna light all those?”
–Walani, when examining a Chandelier
“Luscious.”
–Warly, when examining a Chandelier
“Tiny torches.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Chandelier
“'TIS A LIGHT O' TEENY FWOOSHINGS”
–Wilba, when examining a Chandelier
“Little fires”
–Wormwood, when examining a Chandelier
“A subtle choice.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Chandelier

×1
"Light with a rustic feel."

“It could use some decoration.”

“Sheesh. Someone doesn't care.”
–Willow, when examining a Rope Light
“Wolfgang not fancy.”

“A futile attempt to battle the darkness.”
–Wendy, when examining a Rope Light
“IN NEED OF AN UPGRADE”
–WX-78, when examining a Rope Light
“Necessary for night reading.”

“We don't need a fancy light.”

“Well, that's boring.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Rope Light
“Inspired!”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Rope Light
“It shall light my cönquests!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Rope Light
“Good. We need a light.”
–Webber, when examining a Rope Light
“It's a light. I'll take it.”
–Walani, when examining a Rope Light
“Tasteless.”
–Warly, when examining a Rope Light
“'Tis a barebones lantern'.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Rope Light
“'TIS A BULB O' LIGHT”

“Light”
–Wormwood, when examining a Rope Light
“It's a light. Nothing else.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Rope Light

title: Hanging Lamps Tab
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Hamlet}} [[File:Ceiling Lights.png|thumb|104x104px|Tab Icon.]] The '''Hanging Lamps Tab''' is a crafting category exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found under the [[Renovate Tab]]. All Hanging Lights emit light. == Craftable Items and Structures == The following items and structures can be acquired in the Hanging Lamps Tab: {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" |- ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Name ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Recipe ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Description ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Spawn Code |- | [[File:Chandelier.png|64px]]
